notes: Suggested standing prompts by property type, offered one-click in the UI. These are the kinds of questions a real prospective applicant or renter would ask an AI assistant. The operator edits or replaces them; Beacon never runs a prompt the operator did not choose.

housing_authority: How do I apply for housing assistance in {city}, {state}?
What is the Section 8 waitlist status for {city}, {state}?
How do housing choice vouchers work in {county}?
What income limits qualify for affordable housing in {state}?
Where can I find low income apartments in {city}, {state}?
multifamily_apartment: What are the best apartments in {city}, {state}?
Where should I rent an apartment in {city}, {state}?
What is a good apartment community near {city}, {state}?
How much is rent for apartments in {city}, {state}?
